notes: Rodrigues broke a finger in Thursday's (Mar. 26) game versus the Wild and is likely done for the season, according to David Dwork of The Hockey News.
Askarov won't return to Thursday's (Mar. 26) game versus the Blues after sustaining an apparent upper-body injury.
Barron is in the concussion protocol following his exit from Thursday's (Mar. 26) game versus the Avalanche.
Talbot has been ruled out of Friday's (Mar. 26) clash in Buffalo, according to Helene St. James of the Detroit Free Press.
Ostlund missed practice Thursday (Mar. 26) after suffering an upper-body injury, as per Bill Hoppe of the Olean Times Herald.
Spurgeon required stitches after crashing into the net on Thursday's (Mar. 26) game versus the Panthers, according to Joe Smith of The Athletic.
Steel didn't finish Thursday's (Mar. 26) game vs. the Islanders and had no update on his status after the game.
Texier won't play versus the Blue Jackets on Thursday (Mar. 26).
Crosby is dealing with a lower-body injury after leaving Thursday's (Mar. 26) game versus the Senators.
Klingberg was out of the lineup Thursday (Mar. 26) versus the Blues due to a lower-body injury.
The Flyers announced Thursday (Mar. 26) that Grebenkin is slated to miss 7-10 days.
Thomas will miss Thursday's (Mar. 26) tilt against San Jose, according to Lou Korac of NHL.com.
Severson left Thursday's (Mar. 26) game against the Canadiens due to an upper-body injury, and there was no update on his status after the game.
DeAngelo will miss the next 1-2 weeks, the team announced Thursday (Mar. 26).
